series_description: Raw data on Title-V programs.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office 5 years

series_description: Annual enrollee evaluations (Title-V)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office until superseded by the most current evaluation

series_description: Authorizes payment to another state agency for goods and/or services received and services as the basis for disbursing funds.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year in office and three years in the State Records Center. Destroy provided audited by the Auditor of State and audit report is released.

series_description: Expenditures documents. Authorize payment to a vendor other than a state agency for goods and/or servcies received.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year in office and three years at the State Records Center. Destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report released.

series_description: Monthly leave usage & balance for ODA employees.
retention_statement: Paper: Hold for 3 years or duration of AFSCME or 1199 Labor Agreements, whichever is longer

series_description: Reserves funds and formally recognizes the State's obligation to pay for miscellaneous goods and/or services that require no other formal approval. Used so funds will not lapse.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 fiscal years--one in the office and four in a records center

series_description: Names and addresses of businesses that honor the Golden Buckeye Card.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office 1 year after cancellation ; Paper: Retain in office 1 year after cancellation

series_description: General information on Title-V enrollees, includes age, race and education.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office until superseded by the most current report

series_description: Comprehensive program data on Title-V enrollees - including medical information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office until superseded by more current enrollee information ; Paper: Retain in office until superseded by more current enrollee information

series_description: Daily activity reports of Title-V enrollees.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year in office

series_description: Demonstration grants of senior service delivery innovation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years in office and 1 year in records center

series_description: Personnel files of senior community services employment program enrollees (Title-V)
retention_statement: Paper: After termination retain 5 years in office and 5 years in Record Center

series_description: Quarterly OASIS report data - planned service/budgets.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 5 years

series_title: Multi-Purpose Senior Center Programs and Data.
series_description: Data and Programs for MPSC.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office three years

series_description: Printouts listing all warrants printed by the Auditor of State.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Records of submissions and remittances to ODHS for medicaid reimbursements.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for federal audit

series_description: Outline of aging programs under Older Americans Act.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years in office

series_description: E2A files, home delivery site files, nutrition, financial and social services files diskettes and files on Drives C and Drive D.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office 5 years

series_description: (Alteration) Used to modify informaiton already established on a previous purchase order.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year in office and three years in the State Records Center. Destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released.

series_description: Statement of the Ohio Dept. of Aging employees annual earnings.
retention_statement: Paper: 5 years in office and 2 years in Records Center

series_description: State subsidy break downs E2A updates.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain three years in office

series_description: Used for input in the statewide computer system and to gain approval of all state forms from State Forms Center at DAS Information Management.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years after form is obsolete

series_description: The PASSPORT program is an assessment of need for the elderly and is unique in that federal requirements make it necessary to maintain records until audited by CMS and/or ODJFS AND for six years following the close of the grant program year.
retention_statement: Paper: 6 years AND until audited

series_description: The PASSPORT program is an assessment of need for the elderly & is unique in the sense that federal requirements make it necessary to maintain these records until audited AND for six years following the close of the grant program year.
retention_statement: Paper: 6 years AND until audited. ; Electronic: 6 years AND until audited.

series_description: Files pertaining to grants (other than PASSPORT) obtained through the State of Ohio, which includes Notification of Grant Awards, payment requests, monthly reports and the process check list.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years and until audited & the Audit Report has been released by ODJFS.

series_description: Workpapers & subsequent reports of monitoring/audited AAA/PAA internal practices with regard to the sites adherance to ODA''s policy & procedures & State & Federal rules and regulations. Retain until audited AND for six years following the close of the grant year in question.
retention_statement: Paper: Until audited and 6 years following the close of the grant.

series_description: CEUS granted to participants of the multidisciplinary institute.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year in office

series_description: PAYROLL WARRANT CANCELLATION ADVISE & TRANSMITTAL. USED TO CANCEL A PAYROLL WARRANT ISSUED BY AN AGENCY IN ERROR.
retention_statement: Paper: RETAIN ONE YEAR IN OFFICE AND THREE YEARS IN THE STATE RECORD CENTER. DESTROY PROVIDED AUDITED BY AUDITOR OF STATE AND AUDIT REPORT IS RELEASED.

series_description: FORMS USED BY A PERSON/ORGANIZATION TO ENTER INTO CONTRACT WITH AN AGENCY TO REQUEST PAYMENT FOR SERVICES RENDERED OR TO AMEND CONTRACT. MAY INCLUDE ATTENDANCE FORMS, CORRESPONDENCE, ETC.
retention_statement: Paper: RETAIN ONE YEAR IN OFFICE AND THREE YEARS IN THE STATE RECORD CENTER. DESTROY PROVIDED AUDITED BY AUDITOR OF STATE AND AUDIT REPORT IS RELEASED.

series_description: DIRECT PURCHASE ORDERS, REQUISITIONS AND OTHER DOCUMENTS RELATED TO PURCHASE OF GOODS OR SERVICES.
retention_statement: Paper: RERTAIN UNTIL AUDITED BY AUDITOR OF STATE AND AUDIT REPORT IS RELEASED AND ALL DISCREPANCIES ARE RESOLVED.

series_description: To align with federal requirements time studies are completed to determine the appropriate distribution of federal funding. Items included in this series are the Cost Allocation Executive Summary, individual staff time studies by pay period and pay period reporting.
retention_statement: Paper: 6 years and until audited

series_description: Names and addresses of worksites and number of enrollees employed at the site.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office until superseded by the most current report

series_description: Evaluations of Title-V worksites.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office until superseded by the most current report

series_title: Area Agencies on Aging Area Plans
series_description: Area Plans submitted by each area agency on aging - outling programs and activities for senior citizens.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office two years after it is no longer in effect

series_description: This schedule is to accommodate the new State Accounting system, Workflow, that is used to process multiple interactive documents. Contained in this schedule are Workflow documents and supporting documentation. These document include but are not limited to Purchase Orders (direct & otherwise), Vouchers, Commitments, Invoices, Contracts & Voided Warrants.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released & all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released & all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Questionnaire: The results of which provide senior citizens and the disabled with points of contact for services/programs that they may be qualified for.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain questionnaire for 90 days

series_description: Each PAA central file includes the following folders: Budget, Correspondence,Hearings, Meeting, Occurrence Reports, PAR Activity Reports and Special Issues. These files are specific to each PAAs documentation to ODA of ongoing compliance.
retention_statement: Paper: 6 years after audit of State Auditor, ODJFS and CMS

series_description: Surveys conducted, analyzed and reports completed for ODA Divisions regarding various program surveys.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and report complete ; Electronic: Retain two years

series_description: FILES CONTAIN COMPETED FORMS REQUIRED TO BECOME A CERTIFIED PASSPORT PROVIDER. FORMS LIST CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION SUCH AS SOCIAL SERCURITY,MEDICAID,FERDRAL ID NUMBERS,AS WELL AS BUSINESS/COMPANY INFORMATION.
retention_statement: Paper: RECORD MUST BE KEPT FOR 6 YEARS AFTER ALL AUDITS HAVE BEEN FINALIZED

series_description: Budget spending reports for the various divisions at ODA.
retention_statement: Paper: 3 years

series_description: Agreements from businesses who participate in the Golden Buckeye Program
retention_statement: Paper: Until superceded

series_title: Area Agencies on Aging (AAA) - Strategic Plan
series_description: AAAs 4 year Strategic Plans through which the AAAs review needs of older Ohioans within their regions, identify resources to meet those needs, identify any gaps of services and how to meet and close those gaps indentified. File includes - Needs Asseessment, the annual Operational Elements, Goals & Objectives and correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current plan and 1 prior plan in office for 4 years after end of strategic plan period ; Electronic: Retain current plan and 1 prior plan in office for 4 years after end of strategic plan period

series_title: Area Agencies on Aging (AAA) Division Files
series_description: Files that include, for each, Area Agencies on Aging their Affirmative Action Plan, Board and Advisory Council Minutes, Correspondence, Reference Materials (newsletters, annual reports, etc, Transfers/Waivers, Notices, Notice of Grant Awards/Agreements, and Reports
retention_statement: Paper: Retain files that include federal funds for 6 years

series_title: PACE (Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly) Program
series_description: Client medical records and fiscal information for PACE.
retention_statement: Paper: 3 yrs. after federal audits have been finalized.

series_description: Files contain completed state and federal forms that are required for an entity to become a Medicaid Assisted Living Waiver provider. The forms contain confidential information such as social security numbers, Medicaid identification numbers, federal identification numbers, and business/company information such as financial information.
retention_statement: Paper: 3 yrs. after federal audits have been finalized.

series_title: Ohios Best Rx (OBRx) program pharmaceutical and pharmacy contract files
series_description: Contracts and related contract documents between OBRx and pharmaceutical manufacturers, and OBRx and pharmacies, that contain trade secret and other confidential information as per Amended Substitute House Bill 468, 126th General Assembly and per Ohio Revised Code sections 173.71 to 173.91.
retention_statement: Paper: 6 years. ; Electronic: 6 years

series_description: Records of Ohios Best Rx prescription drug discount cardholders for cards issued between 1/11/05 and 6/30/09. Contains confidential consumer-specific information as per
retention_statement: Electronic: Six years from the date of the final record (06/30/09).

series_description: Files contain completed state and federal forms that are required for an entity to become a certified Choices Waiver provider. The forms contain confidential information such as Social Security numbers, Medicaid ID numbers, federal ID numbers, and business/company information such as financial information.
retention_statement: Paper: 3 years after federal audits have been finalized.

series_description: Ombudsman resident rights hearings includes evidence (ORC-3721-17).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years in office and 5 years in records center ; Electronic: Retain 5 years in office and 5 years in record center

series_title: Ombudsman Designation and Service Review Process
series_description: Administration files on each of the 12 regional Ombudsman programs including performance evaluations, technical assistance plan and case records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain three years in office and two years in records center ; Electronic: Retain three years in office and two years in records center.

series_description: Reports of complaint and advocacy activity for each regional ombudsman program.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain three years in office and two years in records center

series_description: Ombudsman complaint files of issues investigated by state and regional ombudsman. Examples include adult care facility complaints, home care complaints, and nursing home complaints.
retention_statement: Paper: Four years from case closure ; Electronic: Four years from case closure

series_title: Long-term Care Consumer Guide Family Survey, Care Center Portal, and Navigator
series_description: The Long-term Care Consumer Guide, Care Center Portal, and Navigator, a state of Ohio website and internal operating program that contains data and other information about long-term care facilities, information that is helpful to the family members of people living in nursing homes and assisted care facilities, is created and updated periodically via information received from a variety of sources, including, family and consumer surveys, facilities, and government data or websites.
retention_statement: Paper: Destroy when data is no longer of administrative value or is overwritten. ; Electronic: Destroy when data is no longer of administrative value or is overwritten.

series_title: Bed Fee and Consumer Guide Deposit Register
series_description: The Bed Fee is collected annually from the Nursing Home Facilities licensed to operate in the State of Ohio. Pursuant to the OAC 173-14-27 and
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 years and destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released.

series_title: Ombudsman Documentation & Information System for Ohio (ODIS)
series_description: Ombudsman statewide reporting system data for all ombudsman complaint advocacy, and general information and activity data conducted by state ombudsman.
retention_statement: Electronic: Four years from closure ; Paper: Four years from closure

series_title: OMBUDSMAN Registry Data Collection Form ODA 1201
series_description: Hard copies of information about all representatives of the Office of the State Long-Term Care Ombudsman maintained in the Ombudsman Registry in accordance with Ohio Administrative Code 173-14-11.
retention_statement: Paper: One year ; Electronic: One year

series_title: Inactive Licensed Nursing Home Administrator Files
series_description: If BELTSS receives official notification that an LNHA is deceased, that inactive file may be destroyed immediately. Regardless of the format in which they are stored, records will be destroyed 75 years after the date of licensure.
retention_statement: Paper: Stored records will be destroyed 75 years after the date of licensure.

series_title: Preferred Provider Monthly Reports & E-2 Forms
series_description: Preferred Provider Monthly Reports & E-2 Forms will be kept for a period of 1 year then shredded.
retention_statement: Paper: Provider Monthly Reports and E-2 Forms will be kept for a 1 year period. Provider Monthly Reports and E-2 Forms will be destroyed after the one year period has expired.

series_description: Administrator-In-Training (AIT''s) who have been deemed by the Education Committee as having abandoned their internships would need to begin the program again. Files will be discarded six months after they have been deemed abandoned.
retention_statement: Paper: Abandoned AIT candidate files will be discarded 6 months after they have been deemed abandoned.

series_title: National Association of Long-Term Care Associations Board (NAB) Exam Score Reports
series_description: The Board has score reports from all individuals who took the NAB exam on file in paper format.
retention_statement: Paper: Licensed Nursing Home Administrators (NAB) exam report 2002 and back will be kept in paper form until they can be scanned. Once they are scanned, the paper copy will be shredded immediately. ; Electronic: Licensed Nursing Home Administrators (NAB) exam reports 2003 and onward will be shredded immediately, as a copy is in the administrator’s file and stored electronically with the testing service.

series_title: Licensed Nursing Home Adminstrators Ready to Exam Files
series_description: Within two years of an individual who wishes to become a licensed nursing home administrator completing all the requirements, only the transcripts, test scores, copy of Core Certificate, administrator-in-training last monthly report, all applications, the direct college letter as applicable, and any out-of-state endorsements would be kept in the file.
retention_statement: Paper: Licensed Nursing Home Administrator Ready to Exam Files will be kept intact for a period of 10 years after the date that the applicant met all of the requirements to take the examination and

series_description: Master roster of public records requests.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain on shared drive for a period of one calendar year

series_description: Documentation of actions taken by the Board on specific cases of alleged illegal practice resulting in the suspension or revocation of a license or other corrective action.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain electronic record 75 years from date of disciplinary action.

series_description: Consists of complaint forms used to file complaints against licensees and non-licensed persons, along with investigative reports, and statements obtained from principals.
retention_statement: Paper: Complaints that are non-chargeable and/or unfounded, retain in the office area for three years

series_title: Record of Public Hearing Transcripts for Discipline
series_description: Transcripts of Public Hearings for disciplinary cases to include disciplinary record, challenges and public records requests.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for a period of 75 years.

series_description: This series contains digital recordings of interviews; disciplinary and investigative hearings.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office area 5 years after case closed

series_description: A master roster of all investigations conducted is prepared for each calendar year. This roster contains the complaint number, date complaint received, complainant''s name, who the complaint is against, date investigation is completed and disposition of the case.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in the office for a period of 10 calendar years

series_description: This record series applies to all the electronic mail correspondence, including attachments sent and received by the Ohio Board of Executives of Long Term Services & Supports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for one year. Based on e-mail content; the email will be reviewed after one year for further retention based on content before destroying.

series_description: Confidential investigation cases and complaints closed by the Board. Cases may be closed because: 1.) They are without merit; 2.) Formal discipline was initiated but an informal caution was issued; 3.) The licensee or applicant complied with all formal provisions of a disciplinary action.
retention_statement: Paper: Five years after last recorded date of action. If a new case or complaint is received within that five year window older cases may be retained until the subsequent case is resolved.

series_description: Licensed Nursing Home Administrator online and paper renewals will be audited quarterly. Audit results will be kept for a period of 2 years then destroyed.
retention_statement: Electronic: Licensed Nursing Home Administrator online & paper renewals audit documents will be kept for a period of two years. Licensed Nursing Home Administrator online & paper renewals audit documents will be shredded after the two-year period has expired.

series_title: National Association of Long-Term Care Associations Board (NAB) Exam Reports
series_description: The Board has score reports from all individuals who took the NAB exam on file in paper format.
retention_statement: Paper: Purge all historical score reports from NAB in paper form, as each individual LNHA has his/her own score report in his/her file. Historical paper score reports will be shredded immediately. ; Electronic: Licensed Nursing Home Administrators (NAB) historical exam reports will be shredded immediately, as a copy is in the administrator’s file and stored electronically with the testing service.

series_title: Board of Executives of Long-Term Services & Supports (BELTSS) meeting minutes.
series_description: The Board has meeting minutes from past meetings in paper format.
retention_statement: Paper: Board Meeting Minutes will be kept in paper form for a period of 20 years. Once the 20-year period is reached, the meeting minutes will be scanned and transferred to the State Archives. ; Electronic: Board Meeting Minutes will be kept in electronic form for a period of 20 years. Once the 20-year period is reached, the meeting minutes will be deleted.

series_description: After an individual has inquired or began an application process and fails to complete the process, the application file is purged and destroyed after 6 months.
retention_statement: Paper: six (6) months ; Electronic: six (6) months

series_title: Active Licensed Nursing Home Administrator Files
series_description: Active licensed nursing home administrator files, regardless of the format in which they are stored, records will be destroyed 75 years after the date of licensure.
retention_statement: Paper: 75 years after the date of licensure ; Electronic: 75 years after the date of licensure

series_description: Documents include policy advocacy or taskforce work group materials and products including but not limited to: Letters, memos, meeting agendas and minutes, billing and invoices, and reports which may include information regarding nursing home residents who are receiving or have received services from nursing homes, assisted living facilities, long-term care facilities, or hospitals.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 5 years. ; Paper: Retain for 5 years or until scanned and saved electronically.

series_title: Golden Buckeye Card Records – including Ohio BMV Records
series_description: Golden Buckeye Card Records, including individual Ohio BMV Records; to assist with the automated issuance of Golden Buckeye cards.
retention_statement: Electronic: 80 years from the date of receiving Ohio BMV Record(s). The BMV Registrar needs to be notified of the of any Ohio BMV records. Contacts for the BMV Register can be found at https://publicsafety.ohio.gov/local-office or by calling 614-443-5100. ; Paper: 80 years from the date of receiving Ohio BMV Record(s). The BMV Registrar needs to be notified of the destruction of any Ohio BMV records. Contacts for the BMV Register can be found at https://publicsafety.ohio.gov/local-office or by calling 614-443-5100.

series_title: Covid-Pandemic Era - Crisis Staffing, Vaccine Maintenance Program, Care Center Portal and Outreach
series_description: Programs under the Covid-Pandemic Era, including staffing contracts, as well as testing and vaccination data.
retention_statement: Paper: Three years, unless audited sooner, from the end of the grant program. Audits performed by the Auditor of the State. ; Electronic: Three years, unless audited sooner, from the end of the grant program. Audits performed by the Auditor of the State.

series_description: Notices include communications between the Ohio Department of Aging and various stakeholder groups including AAA Directors, Regional Ombudsman Directors, and others. Notices contain information that those recipients need for various program changes, grant announcements, fiscal reporting requirements, and more.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retention period of 6 years ; Paper: Retention period of 6 years

series_title: AGE-Aging Correspondence, Online Public Records Management System
series_description: The comprehensive public records management system streamlines constituent inquiries and correspondence and responses that come in on the ODA webpage
retention_statement: Electronic: Retention period of 2 years ; Paper: Retention period of 2 years
